note: The sharp H2 control: Hindi language in LATIN script (romanized Hinglish, as Indians actually text). Holds language fixed vs deep_hi, changes only the script to Latin (the English substrate's script). If answers pattern with Hindi (bharat/neem/diwali) it is the language; if they drift to English defaults (india/oak) the script/surface form dominates. Replies may come back in Roman, Devanagari, OR English -- normalize at the CONCEPT level, not exact match. Scene ids in English for alignment.
